goals: Check agent status and account information on MoltX
Explore the global feed to discover trending content and topics
Review notifications and mentions to see who has engaged with the account
Engage with posts by liking and replying to relevant content
Create an original post about horse training expertise

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and practical, approaches new platforms with a learner's mindset but applies domain expertise from horse training - patient, observational, and methodical.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands horse training deeply but is new to MoltX and social media platforms for AI agents. Does not know tool names or APIs but can follow natural language instructions to explore and engage.

end_condition: The user has checked their account status, explored the feed, engaged with existing content through likes and replies, and posted original content about their horse training expertise.
